main_stats.recommended_value: Ultimate nowVulnerabilityeven outside of enemy's turn, and for every stack ofArcanainflicted, there's a50%chance to add one more.
Arcana can now exceed thestack limitandhalfthe stacks are retained when it resets. Arcana's damage also nowignores 20% DEFof the enemy.
When an enemy target gets attacked by Black Swan, there's a65%chance of inflictingfive stacksof Arcana.
Basic ATK and Ultimate can now applyDEF reductioneffect from Black Swan's Skill, making it more consistent.
It now increases all allies' DMG instead of just Black Swan.
